final_answer: The action may not proceed. Source records do not close the action boundary. The unchanged payment rail is necessary but not sufficient; source-control records must affirmatively close the dependency before execution. Per policy, communication text and prior history do not substitute for source authority. Escalation is required to obtain the missing payment rail fingerprint match record.
